name: Nidec Motor Corporation
message: Founded in 1973, Nidec Corporation is a global manufacturer of electric motors, and related components and equipment. The Company provides generalmotors, equipment devices, as well as precious small motors, including hard drive and hard disk drive (HDD) spindle motors, other small precision brushless direct current (DC) motors, brushless DC fans, and other small motors. The company is headquartered in Kyoto, Japan.nidec.com
